title: ilex tetramera var. tetramera
intro: Ilex tetramera var. tetramera, also known as Chinese holly or Chinese evergreen holly, is a plant species that belongs to the Aquifoliaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving cognitive function, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. In traditional Chinese medicine, Ilex tetramera var. tetramera is often prepared as a tea, infusing the leaves in hot water, or used in combination with other herbs to create tonics and remedies.
